title: Woodluv Storage Baskets Set of 2, Round Shaped Wicker Woven Wedding, Flower Girls, Easter, Display & Gift Hamper Basket, Natural
features: ★ PREMIUM MATERIAL - Woodluv's versatile round shaped multi-purpose baskets are handwoven for wicker that gives the baskets a distinctive and appealing aesthetic.

★ ARTFUL WEAVING - The baskets showcase a meticulous weaving pattern that seamlessly integrates wicker. This results in a visually pleasing and texturally interesting design, adding a touch of sophistication to any setting.

★ VERSATILE USAGE - These baskets are suitable for a variety of purposes, making them highly versatile. They can be used for gifting, creating aesthetically pleasing hampers, arranging flower displays, or organizing various items around the house.
★ LARGE BASKET : 22 diameter x 26cm (H) Approx, Small basket - Diameter - 18cm x 22cm Height
★ ROUND CARRY HANDLE - The baskets feature a round carry handle made from sturdy wicker, making them easy to transport and adding a charming element to their design.
description: Product Description Functional Artistry: Handwoven Wicker Basket Ensemble Introducing a charming set of two large and small nesting baskets crafted delicately from natural wicker, designed to add a touch of rustic elegance to your home decor. Each basket features intricate handwoven detailing, showcasing the skilled craftsmanship that goes into their creation. Elevate Your Home Decor: Handwoven Wicker Basket Practical Panache: Exquisite Basket Set Use it to create a stylish hamper or to sort out a variety of items such small accessory, for organizing your home. Offers versatility in its use, ideal for holding smaller items like fruit, flowers, or serving as a delightful vessel for Easter eggs or floral arrangements. Effortless Organisation: Optimize Storage Space Complements a variety of interior styles, from farmhouse and coastal to bohemian and eclectic, enhancing the ambiance of any space. The nesting feature allows the smaller basket to neatly fit inside the larger one when not in use, optimizing storage space. Set of 2 handwoven Nesting Baskets Natural Beauty: Set of Two Wicker Baskets with Long Carry Handle Includes one large and one small basket, offering versatility in storage options. The nesting feature allows the smaller basket to neatly fit inside the larger one when not in use, saving space and providing convenient storage solutions. Both baskets are thoughtfully designed with a long, sturdy carry handle, allowing for easy transportation from one place to another. Made from quality materials, these baskets are built to withstand daily use and maintain their beauty over time. Create a Versatile & Innovative Hamper Create an Unforgettable Gift Hamper For Lasting Impression Use our versatile baskets to create innovative gift hampers. These baskets offer a wide range of customization options, allowing you to create personalized gift hampers tailored to your preferences and occasions. Just choose from an assortment of items to include in the basket, and viola your gift for your loved ones in sorted. Our basket set combines convenience, customization, and quality to offer a premium gifting solution suitable for any occasion. Handcrafted Charm: Wicker Nesting Baskets for Every Need Each basket is meticulously handwoven from natural wicker, ensuring durability and unique character. Embrace functionality and style with this exquisite set, designed to enhance your home decor with its timeless appeal and artisanal craftsmanship.
